executives.name: Ava Hahn
executives.background: Ms. Hahn has been our Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since January 2020. Prior to joining Lam, she served as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary of CA Technologies from 2018 to 2019.

executives.name: Bethany Mayer
executives.background: Ms. Mayer has been a director since 2019. She was President and CEO of Ixia.

executives.name: David Weigand
executives.background: David Weigand has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer since February 2021. He joined Supermicro in 2018 and previously served as Senior Vice President, Chief Compliance Officer. Before joining Supermicro, he held various executive positions at Renesas Electronics America and Integrated Device Technology.

executives.name: George Kurtz
executives.background: George Kurtz is our co-founder and has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since November 2011. From October 2009 to September 2011, Mr. Kurtz served as Worldwide Chief Technology Officer of McAfee, Inc., a computer security software company. Prior to that, Mr. Kurtz served in various other positions at McAfee, including Senior Vice President and General Manager, Risk Management from October 2005 to October 2009. Mr. Kurtz co-founded Foundstone, Inc., a worldwide security products and services company, and served as its Chief Executive Officer from October 1999 until its acquisition by McAfee in October 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Jean Hobby
executives.background: Former Strategy Officer at PricewaterhouseCoopers, LLP.

executives.name: Lip-Bu Tan
executives.background: Lip-Bu Tan has been a director since 2022. He is Chairman of Walden International and was formerly CEO and Executive Chairman of Cadence Design Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Margaret Whitman
executives.background: U.S. Ambassador to Kenya; former CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

executives.name: Mary Hassett
executives.background: Ms. Hassett has been our Senior Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer since May 2020. Prior to joining Lam, she spent 25 years at Hewlett Packard Enterprise in various HR leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Human Resources (Hybrid IT organization)
Chair of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Rami Rahim
executives.background: Mr. Rahim has served as our Chief Executive Officer since November 2014. He has been with Juniper since 1997, serving in various roles including Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Development and Innovation organization.

executives.name: Robert Calderoni
executives.background: Robert Calderoni was the Executive Chairman of Citrix Systems, Inc. and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Ariba, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Bethany Mayer
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Mayer has been a director since 2019. She was President and CEO of Ixia.
